description: Overlay network service contract v1 — 14 operations across device inventory, access control, DNS configuration, key management, and audit logging for Tailscale, ZeroTier, Nebula, and similar overlay networks.

operations.description: Network health check — device counts, online/offline, key expiry warnings, settings
operations.name: info

operations.description: List all devices — hostname, OS, IP, online/offline, key expiry, tags
operations.name: devices

operations.description: Full detail for a single device — addresses, client version, key status, user
operations.name: device

operations.description: Subnet routes for a device — advertised, approved/unapproved status
operations.name: device_routes

operations.description: Access control policy — groups, rules, SSH rules, who can reach what
operations.name: acl

operations.description: DNS configuration — nameservers, search paths, split DNS rules
operations.name: dns

operations.description: Auth keys — reusable/ephemeral/preauthorized flags, tags, expiry
operations.name: keys

operations.description: Users — name, role, status, device count, online/last seen
operations.name: users

operations.description: Configuration change log — who changed what, when
operations.name: audit_log

operations.description: Authorize or deauthorize a device on the network
operations.name: authorize_device

operations.description: Set access control tags on a device
operations.name: set_tags

operations.description: Force key expiry — device must re-authenticate
operations.name: expire_device

operations.description: Approve advertised subnet routes on a device
operations.name: approve_routes

title: overlay-network-v1
